title: APIOps Filter Configuration
description: Validates configuration.extractor.yaml files used by APIOps CLI to select which Azure API Management resources are extracted. All resource sections are optional.

$schema.description: Optional schema URI for editor and IDE validation.

apis.description: APIs to extract. Each item can be either a plain API name or wildcard pattern, or an object with a single API name mapped to nested API sub-filters. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

backends.description: Backends to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

products.description: Products to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

namedValues.description: Named values to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

loggers.description: Loggers to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

diagnostics.description: Diagnostics to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

tags.description: Tags to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

policyFragments.description: Policy fragments to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

gateways.description: Gateways to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

versionSets.description: Version sets to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

groups.description: Groups to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

subscriptions.description: Subscriptions to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

schemas.description: Schemas to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

policies.description: Service-level policies to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

policyRestrictions.description: Policy restrictions to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

documentations.description: Documentations to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

workspaces.description: Workspaces to extract. Each item can be either a plain workspace name or wildcard pattern, or an object with a single workspace name mapped to nested workspace sub-filters. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

resourcePattern.description: A resource name or wildcard pattern. Matching is case-insensitive. Supported wildcards: * matches zero or more characters, and ? matches a single character.

resourcePatternArray.description: A list of resource names or wildcard patterns. Matching is case-insensitive. Supported wildcards: * and ?.

oneOf.description: A single API name mapped to sub-resource filters for that API.
A single workspace name mapped to sub-resource filters for that workspace.

apiSubFilter.description: Sub-resource filters for a specific API. Omit a property to include all sub-resources of that type, or set it to an empty array to exclude all of that type. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

operations.description: Operations to extract for this API. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

diagnostics.description: Diagnostics to extract for this API. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

schemas.description: Schemas to extract for this API. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

releases.description: Releases to extract for this API. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

workspaceSubFilter.description: Sub-resource filters for a specific workspace. Omit a property to include all resources of that type, or set it to an empty array to exclude all of that type. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

apis.description: APIs within this workspace to extract. Each item can be either a plain API name or wildcard pattern, or an object with a single API name mapped to nested API sub-filters. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

backends.description: Backends within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

diagnostics.description: Diagnostics within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

groups.description: Groups within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

loggers.description: Loggers within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

namedValues.description: Named values within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

policyFragments.description: Policy fragments within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

products.description: Products within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

schemas.description: Schemas within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

subscriptions.description: Subscriptions within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

tags.description: Tags within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.

versionSets.description: Version sets within this workspace to extract. Matching is case-insensitive and supports * and ? wildcards.
